messages.message: 'Button' is defined but never used.

Error: Cannot access variable before it is declared

`playAudioChunk` is accessed before it is declared, which prevents the earlier access from updating when this value changes over time.

E:\AICompanion\Rx\aigirl\frontend\src\components\voice\RealtimeVoiceCall.tsx:84:21
  82 |             case 'audio_chunk':
  83 |               // Play audio chunk
> 84 |               await playAudioChunk(data.data);
     |                     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `playAudioChunk` accessed before it is declared
  85 |               break;
  86 |               
  87 |             case 'text_response':

E:\AICompanion\Rx\aigirl\frontend\src\components\voice\RealtimeVoiceCall.tsx:149:3
  147 |   
  148 |   // Play audio chunk
> 149 |   const playAudioChunk = async (base64Data: string) => {
      |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 150 |     if (!audioContextRef.current) return;
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 151 |     
      …
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 170 |     }
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 171 |   };
      | ^^^^^ `playAudioChunk` is declared here
  172 |   
  173 |   // Start recording
  174 |   const startRecording = async () => {
'sendTextMessage' is assigned a value but never used.

Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

E:\AICompanion\Rx\aigirl\frontend\src\components\voice\RealtimeVoiceCall.tsx:301:32
  299 |                   className="w-1 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"
  300 |                   style={{
> 301 |                     height: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,
      |                                ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  302 |                     animationDelay: `${i * 0.05}s`,
  303 |                   }}
  304 |                 />

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'getStoryDescription' and 'getStoryTitle'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [getStoryDescription, getStoryTitle]

source:
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Container } from '@/components/layout'; import { Button, CharacterCarousel, GameplayStepCard, VideoCharacterGrid } from '@/components/common'; import { Sparkles, BookOpen, GitBranch, Unlock, Heart, MessageCircle, Mic, Check, Star, User } from 'lucide-react'; import { api } from '@/services/api'; import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext'; export function LandingPage() { const { isAuthenticated } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [characters, setCharacters] = useState([]); const [videoCharacters, setVideoCharacters] = useState([]); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); const normalizeStoryText = (value?: string) => { if (!value || typeof value !== 'string') return ''; const cleaned = value.replace(/\*/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (cleaned.length <= 140) return cleaned; return `${cleaned.slice(0, 137)}...`; }; const getStoryTitle = (char: any) => { const story = char?.default_story; return normalizeStoryText(story?.title) || ''; }; const getStoryDescription = (char: any) => { const story = char?.default_story; return normalizeStoryText(story?.description) || ''; }; useEffect(() => { const fetchCharacters = async () => { setIsLoading(true); try { const schemaVersion = import.meta.env.VITE_CHARACTER_SCHEMA_VERSION; const requestUrl = schemaVersion ? `/characters/official?schema_version=${encodeURIComponent(schemaVersion)}` : '/characters/official'; const response = await api.get(requestUrl); if (response.data && Array.isArray(response.data)) { const fetchedChars = response.data.map((c: any) => ({ id: c.id, name: c.name || c.first_name, age: c.age, trait: c.tags?.[0] || 'Charming', image: c.images?.[0] || c.profile_image_url, desc: c.description || 'AI Companion', storyTitle: getStoryTitle(c), storyDescription: getStoryDescription(c), video: c.video_url, videos: c.videos || [], version: c.meta?.version || c.version })); setCharacters(fetchedChars); setVideoCharacters(fetchedChars); } } catch (error) { console.error("Failed to fetch characters:", error); } finally { setIsLoading(false); } }; fetchCharacters(); }, []); const scrollToSection = (id: string) => { const element = document.getElementById(id); if (element) { element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); } }; // Helper to navigate to chat if authenticated, otherwise to register const handleGetStarted = () => { if (isAuthenticated) { navigate('/chat'); } else { navigate('/register'); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
Powered by Advanced AI

Play a Story With Your{' '} AI Companion

Pick a character, drop into an opening scene, make branching choices, and unlock new relationship moments and scenes as the story grows.

Free to start
No credit card required
Cancel anytime
{/* Gameplay Loop Section */}

The Story Loop

A simple loop that feels like a game, not a chat log.

} /> } /> } /> } />
{/* Featured Characters Section */}

Meet the Story Cast

Each character comes with a unique opening scene and branching arc.

Live Moments

{/* Features Section */}

Core Gameplay Mechanics

The systems that make each chat feel like an unfolding story.

Opening Stories

Each character starts with a curated scenario that sets the mood.

Branching Dialogue

Your choices change the story, the tone, and the next scene.

Relationship Progress

Build affinity over time to unlock new tones and story beats.

Scene Unlocks

Reach milestones that open private scenes and hidden details.

Responsive Dialogue

Fast, natural replies that keep the pacing of the story.

Voice & Visuals

Bring scenes to life with voice, images, and video moments.

{/* Relationship Progression Section */}

Relationship & Scene Unlocks

Every choice builds affinity. As you grow closer, you unlock new scenes, deeper backstory, and special moments unique to each character.

Frequently Asked Questions

{[ { q: 'How does the story start?', a: 'Each character opens with a crafted scene. You reply to the situation and the story branches from there.' }, { q: 'Do my choices matter?', a: 'Yes. The tone, pace, and next scene reflect the direction you choose in the conversation.' }, { q: 'What are relationship levels?', a: 'As you chat, you build affinity that unlocks new scenes, memories, and character reveals.' }, { q: 'Can I replay a story?', a: 'You can explore different branches by starting new conversations with the same character.' }, { q: 'What is included in the free plan?', a: 'Free users get daily story credits and access to core branching scenes. Upgrade to unlock more choices and faster progression.' }, { q: 'Does voice and video change gameplay?', a: 'They enhance immersion and unlock premium moments, but the core branching story loop is available to all.' } ].map((faq, idx) => (

'afterAll' is defined but never used.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
